meaning: n.安道尔共和国(位于欧洲),安道尔市
examples: Andorra is also known for its excellent skiing locations.
Many people in Andorra found new jobs in shops or hotels.
Clothes, watches, wines and other items are sold at low prices in Andorra.
Turkey beat bottom side Andorra to be four points further back in fourth place.
The two already have subsidiaries in Portugal and Andorra, and stakes in Italian and French banks.
